scenes.narration: Bhai sun, ye Kafka Consumer Groups ki ek mistake teri ₹35-55LPA ki Amazon offer cancel kara dega.
Without understanding Kafka Consumer Groups, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Kafka Consumer Groups like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Kafka Consumer Groups: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Kafka Consumer Groups: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Kafka Consumer Groups to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Kafka Consumer Groups solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
